title: linaria pyramidalis
intro: Linaria pyramidalis, also known as the Pyramid Spurred Vetchling, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linaria pyramidalis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or dried for future use.
